templates.name: System Power Log Review
templates.description: Gathers and standardizes Kernel-Power logs to review system sleep, shutdown, and uptime activity.

templates.name: Sysmon 255 Drop Counter
templates.description: Monitors for Sysmon Event ID 255, which indicates that events are being dropped, to diagnose logging gaps.
templates.kql:
let start = ago(1d);
let end = now();
let host = 'workstation-1';
Event
| where TimeGenerated between (start .. end)
| where Computer has (host)
| where Source == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon"
| where EventID == 255
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Computer,
    ParameterXml

templates.name: Logon Frequency Analysis Outside Working Hours
templates.description: Analyzes logon frequency outside of standard working hours to identify potentially anomalous account activity.

templates.name: Critical Process Cloning
templates.description: Identifies instances where critical Windows processes (like lsass.exe) are cloned or forked, a common technique used by malware.
templates.kql:
let criticalProcesses = dynamic(["lsass.exe", "wininit.exe", "services.exe"]);
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4688 // Process Creation
| extend ParentProcessName = tostring(split(NewProcessName, '\\')[-1])
| where ParentProcessName in~ (criticalProcesses)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Computer,
    ParentProcessName,
    NewProcessName,
    CommandLine

templates.name: Package Loading Rarity Determination
templates.description: Identifies infrequently loaded security, authentication, or notification packages to spot potential outliers and suspicious activity.
templates.kql:
let Hostname  = "";
let startTime = datetime(2026-04-01);
let endTime   = datetime(2026-04-30);
let rarityThreshold = 10;
let allPackageLoads = SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated between (startTime .. endTime)
| where Computer has (Hostname)
| where EventID in (4610, 4611, 4614, 4622)
| extend RawPackageName = case(
    isnotempty(extract(@'<Data Name=\"AuthenticationPackageName\">(.*?)</Data>', 1, EventData)), extract(@'<Data Name=\"AuthenticationPackageName\">(.*?)</Data>', 1, EventData),
    isnotempty(extract(@'<Data Name=\"SecurityPackageName\">(.*?)</Data>', 1, EventData)), extract(@'<Data Name=\"SecurityPackageName\">(.*?)</Data>', 1, EventData),
    isnotempty(extract(@'<Data Name=\"NotificationPackageName\">(.*?)</Data>', 1, EventData)), extract(@'<Data Name=\"NotificationPackageName\">(.*?)</Data>', 1, EventData),
    AuthenticationPackageName
)
| where isnotempty(RawPackageName);
let packageCounts = allPackageLoads
| summarize
    LoadCount = count(),
    Users = make_set(SubjectUserName),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
  by
    PackageName = RawPackageName,
    EventID;
packageCounts
| where LoadCount < rarityThreshold
| sort by LoadCount asc
